execution_analysis.suggested_action: when using a Brawler family platform, include the verified Brawler mover and threat processor pattern rather than approximating with generic air-platform components
evidence_lines: ***** ERROR: WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM must have a WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER!

repair_recommendation.suggested_action: when using a Brawler family platform, include the verified Brawler mover and threat processor pattern rather than approximating with generic air-platform components

preconditions: apply the recommended repair at the routed stage
rerun static_checker_v1 after the repair changes the script text
rerun mission.exe only after the regenerated script passes static verification

repaired_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern RADAR_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 30 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 20 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 20 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type FIGHTER_TYPE WSF_BRAWLER_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER
      maximum_speed 250 m/sec
      minimum_speed 60 m/sec
   end_mover
   fuel WSF_BRAWLER_FUEL
   end_fuel
   sensor radar_sensor WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      minimum_range 0 nm
      maximum_range 80 nm
      reports_location
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern RADAR_ANT
         power 150 kw
         pulse_width 2.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 400 hz
         frequency 1285 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern RADAR_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor thinker WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
   processor incoming_threats WSF_THREAT_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform blue_fighter FIGHTER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar_sensor
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

platform red_fighter FIGHTER_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.92n 104.37e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
      position 30.67n 104.07e altitude 3000 m msl speed 180 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor radar_sensor
      on
   end_sensor
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/brawler_1v1.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 300 sec
